content: GitHub reports how recent legal developments affect developers. The Supreme Court’s Cox v Sony decision clarifies that platform operators are not automatically liable for user‑copyright infringement without intent, giving developers legal certainty. title: Costasiella kuroshimae – Solar Powered animals, that do indirect photosynthesis
content: **Costasiella kuroshimae: Small sea slugs that harness light through symbiotic algae for indirect photosynthesis.** The slug hosts chlorophyll‑containing algae within its tissues, allowing it to capture sunlight and convert it into energy, supplementing its diet. This unique symbiosis enables the organism to thrive in low‑food environments by effectively becoming a living solar panel. The slugs also shed light on the ecological roles of symbiotic photosynthesis in marine ecosystems.

title: 搞个云端 claude code 防止 封号
content: After losing several accounts, the author discovered that forgetting to toggle the global proxy caused IP changes when switching devices. The tool runs on the VPS, can be accessed from a phone, and includes voice‑to‑text input. The author used Claude Code for development and confirmed the setup complies with its rules. title: 把电脑伪装成电视，用 DLNA 投屏拿到视频号直播流地址
content:
最近想把视频号的一些直播存下来，搜了一圈发现这事居然这么麻烦 —— 要么挂代理抓包装证书，要么上逆向 Hook 微信进程，总之没一个省心的。 后来突然想到一个事：微信投屏到电视不是用的 DLNA 吗？那电视能拿到直播流地址，我电脑装个假电视不就行了？

试了一下，还真可以。SSDP 组播宣告自己是 MediaRenderer ，微信就会在投屏列表里显示出来。选中之后微信会通过 SOAP 把 m3u8 地址 POST 过来，直接截获就完事了。

整个过程不需要动微信客户端，不需要证书，不需要代理，因为这就是标准的 DLNA 协议流程 —— 微信没法区分真电视和假电视…

title: 科普一下低价 gpt 是怎么来的

说白了就是卡 bug 的灵车。 像新加坡、日本、英国这些地区，有时候会有首月免费试用。Telegram 上有 bot 可以全自动免费帮你开通。你只要把自己的 access token 贴进去，它就帮你操作。原理基本就是 ip 代理到免费试用活动区，拿虚拟信用卡、假地址之类的东西去薅首月试用。

title: 啃了那篇 54 页的 Agent Harness 综述, 给大伙讲个省流版
content: The reviewed 54‑page paper argues that to improve LLM agents, one should externalize tasks—memory, skills, protocols—into the environment rather than enlarging model weights. External tools turn difficult recall tasks into easy recognition, simplifying agent behavior. The paper traces a shift from weight‑centric models (2022) to prompt‑driven contexts (2023‑24), and now to harnesses that manage memory, skill libraries, and communication protocols. Effective memory is about retrieval quality, skills package verified workflows, and protocols eliminate guesswork in tool use. The goal is a better‑organized cognitive system, not a larger model.

title: 刚刚，李飞飞最新成果发布，手机也能跑亿级粒子的 3D 世界了
content: World Labs released Spark 2.0, a WebGL2‑based 3D Gaussian splats renderer that lets mobile browsers display over 100 million splats with smooth performance. It combines continuous LoD trees, foveated rendering, a new .RAD streaming format, and GPU‑side virtual memory. Spark supports multi‑object scenes, dynamic animation, and can be used with the Marble content platform to create and share large AI‑generated 3D worlds via a simple webpage link.

title: 2026 斯坦福 AI 指数报告：美国 AI 投资规模是中国的 23 倍，但 AI 模型基本没差距了
content: Stanford’s 2026 AI Index Report shows AI adoption is accelerating worldwide, with generative AI penetration at 53% and 88% of businesses using it. U.S. investment outpaces China by 23×, but China leads in papers, patents, and industrial robot installations; the U.S. dominates top models, high‑value patents, and funding. Nvidia controls over 60% of AI compute capacity. The report highlights issues such as high energy and water usage, model error rates, hallucination, limited transparency, and regulatory lag. Employment effects are uncertain, and public opinion remains mixed.

If launch is delayed, initial stock could be limited, but exact dates and inventory levels will be confirmed at the September event.

title: 写了个 Go 库解决 LLM 流式输出断线重连的问题
content: A Go library tackles the problem of keeping LLM‑streamed output alive across network hiccups or page reloads. The solution uses Redis Streams to store chunks, replaying history to the reconnecting client and then delivering live data. Redis Pub/Sub signals cancellations, allowing workers on different instances to terminate safely. Each producer gets a generation ID to prevent stale writes, and only one producer per session can run. The API lets producers register, publish, and consumers subscribe to streams via simple Go snippets.

It encourages investors to reassess their asset‑allocation principles, focus on resilience, and embrace more nuanced portfolio construction that moves beyond conventional bond–equity hedging.

title: 502个中产家庭晒账单：越来越多人不想“鸡娃”了 | 原文
content: A survey of 502 middle‑class families shows that parents are increasingly reluctant to overinvest in “chicken‑egg” education. Spending on children has tightened, and overseas study is now judged by cost‑benefit ratios. National statistics reveal a notable drop in per‑capita consumer expenditure, especially in Shanghai, where consumer downgrading is strongest. McKinsey’s 2025 China Consumer Trends report confirms that the share of disposable income spent on consumption has continued to decline, including a recent slowdown in educational spending.

title: 争夺女性选民的角逐正在改变印度的选举格局
content: The struggle to win over women voters is reshaping India’s electoral dynamics. Political parties are increasingly tailoring campaigns, policies, and outreach strategies to appeal to female constituents, recognizing their growing influence and turnout. This shift is altering campaign priorities, candidate selection, and issue focus, making voter gender a decisive factor in election outcomes across the country.

title: GPT-6 准备发牌了！聊聊最近折腾 Hermes-Agent 的一点心得
content: GPT‑6 is expected to transition from chatbot to “digital life,” featuring native agentic workflows, long‑term memory, and real‑time video processing. Its 2 M‑token context window allows handling large codebases or books, surpassing GPT‑5.4’s limits. While Claude 4.6 Opus remains strong in adaptive reasoning, GPT‑6’s built‑in agent support, deeper multimodal handling, and larger context give it an edge. Hermes‑Agent, from Nous Research, is noted for robust tool calling and clearer task state management, outperforming OpenClaw for server‑side automation and coding tasks.

转：AI推理时代的CPU架构报告 主题：Arm、x86、RISC-V 在 AI 推理基础设施中的竞争格局与投资关注方向
一、先说结论
如果只看未来 3–5 年，我的核心判断是：
第一，AI 推理时代不会出现“单一 ISA 一统天下”，而是分层分场景竞争。
第二，新增 AI 基础设施里，Arm 是最强趋势；企业和传统数据中心里，x86 仍然是最大存量；RISC-V 是长期最值得跟踪的开放替代路线，但短期还不是主流。
第三，真正决定输赢的不是 ISA 本身，而是“CPU 在异构推理系统里承担什么角色”。现在 CPU 的价值，正在从通用算力，转向…
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 但斌

title: 深度｜台湾大规模引入印度劳工，不料引发民粹大反弹... | 原文
content: Taiwan plans to admit up to 100,000 Indian workers after a secret 2017 agreement. A Bloomberg report in November 2023 announced the pact, sparking widespread online debate and on‑ground protests. Student groups led the demonstrations, questioning the sudden policy and fearing increased crime and economic impact. The backlash illustrates deep public division over Taiwan’s foreign labor strategy.
